title: What sanctions are actually designed to do - Sarah Paine
summary: A YouTube discussion between Dwarkesh Patel and Sarah Paine examining the actual mechanisms and design of economic sanctions in international affairs. This content addresses geopolitical policy rather than artificial intelligence or related technologies.
